summary: A clip from a Fox News segment with a FOX NEWS ALERT banner. It shows footage of a White House cabinet-room meeting with several officials seated around a table, a split screen of a studio anchor and a commentator alongside a photo of a young woman with an Instagram credit and a booking-style photo sourced to DHS, and a seated family interview. Lower-thirds read LOYOLA STUDENT MURDER SUSPECT DUE IN COURT, ILLEGAL ALIEN MURDER SUSPECT DUE IN COURT, and GORMAN FAMILY SPEAKS AFTER SHERIDAN'S MURDER.

script.scene: Footage of a White House cabinet-room meeting with officials seated around a table; lower-third reads LOYOLA STUDENT MURDER SUSPECT DUE IN COURT.
A split screen shows an anchor and a commentator alongside a photo of a young woman and a booking-style photo sourced to DHS; lower-third reads ILLEGAL ALIEN MURDER SUSPECT DUE IN COURT.
A seated family interview; lower-third reads GORMAN FAMILY SPEAKS AFTER SHERIDAN'S MURDER.
